channel.title: Corruption on Netlooker's Notes
channel.description: Recent content in Corruption on Netlooker's Notes

item.title: The Inquisitor's Harvest: A Fusion Chronicle
item.description:
// THE INQUISITOR’S HARVEST // 7 STORIES, 1 HARVEST

PAYLOAD: FUSION CHRONICLE
SOURCE: Synapse Fusion Entry
BASED ON: 7 Harvested Cold Open Stories (Chris Buxey Collection)
FACTION: Inquisition (Ordo Hereticus)
RATING: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ (5/5)

// LINKED STORIES: SYNAPSE INDEX

  • 01-is-rogal-dorn-the-one-with-wings.md — Corrupt governors, Scouring Fleet
  • 02-chit-happens.md — Administrative pen-pushers, purity chits
  • 03-the-billion-skulls-of-inquisitor-corvin-fane.md — Daemon in Inquisitor’s body
  • 04-the-last-one-hundred-lasguns.md — Factory workers, production over survival
  • 05-rare-meat.md — Chaos pacts, veteran offerings
  • 06-events-at-recruitment-station-chryses.md — Abhuman recruitment
  • 07-hagens-legacy.md — Space Marine tragedy, forgotten sacrifice

// PROLOGUE: THE NAME THAT ECHOES

The name Inquisitor Corvin Fane echoed over and over in my skull. Or maybe it was someone else’s skull. I couldn’t tell anymore.
